title: Assorted Colors Plush Puppy with Love Heart - 15 cm - Perfect for Romantic Events, Birthdays, Anniversaries, and Baby Showers (1 Pc.)
features: PUPPY WITH LOVE HEART: Adorable 15 cm tall plush puppy in coffee or cream colors, holding a love heart that will make a thoughtful and delightful gift for your loved ones. (Note: you will receiveone color only).
SUPER SOFT PLUSH: Our coffee or cream plush puppy is crafted from high-quality, soft plush fabric that is perfect for cuddling and provides an extra comforting touch.
IDEAL FOR ROMANTIC EVENTS: Bring a smile to someone's face with this charming plush puppy, perfect for Valentine's Day, anniversaries, birthdays, or baby showers.
THOUGHTFUL & UNIQUE GIFT: Surprise your partner, friend, or family member with this beautiful coffee or cream plush puppy, sure to impress and create lasting memories.
CREATE ENDEARING MOMENTS: Capture hearts and add warmth to any special occasion with this loveable coffee or cream plush puppy with love heart, designed to be a treasured keepsake for years to come.
description: Introducing our assorted colors plush puppy, a delightful addition to any celebration or special occasion. Standing at 15 cm tall, this adorable puppy is beautifully crafted with coffee-colored fur, cream accents, and a loving heart, ready to spread warmth and cheer. Its plush, soft-to-touch texture enhances its charm, making it an irresistible companion. Perfect for romantic events, birthdays, anniversaries, or baby showers, it's more than just a gift—it's a gesture of love and affection. Each package contains 1 piece of coffee or cream plush puppy, delivering a bundle of joy and tenderness right to your doorstep.
